term: Captioned by Media Access Group at WGBH
pronunciation: /ˈkæpʃənd baɪ ˈmiːdiə ˈæksɛs ɡruːp æt ˌdʌbəlˌdʌbəlˌdʌbəl ˌdʒiː biː eɪtʃ/
englishDefinitions: A captioning credit showing that the subtitles or closed captions were created by the Media Access Group at WGBH.
A formal production note used in media to identify the organization responsible for captioning.
persianTranslation: زیرنویس‌گذاری شده توسط Media Access Group در WGBH
اعتبار زیرنویس: گروه دسترسی رسانه‌ای در WGBH
examples: The documentary ended with the note 'Captioned by Media Access Group at WGBH.'
This episode includes accessibility credits captioned by Media Access Group at WGBH.
Viewers saw the line 'Captioned by Media Access Group at WGBH' in the closing credits.
